## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX Labs to discuss content, outbound, and link-building strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is ramping up slowly to avoid overwhelming Datagrid's crawl budget](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Outbound campaigns showing promising early results with high open rates](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Link building efforts initiated through client roster and cold outreach](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Need for more in-depth understanding of Datagrid's product capabilities and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Plans to leverage Thiago's expertise for social media content and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Content calendar scheduled with graphics, dates to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Ramping up slowly due to Datagrid's current crawl budget limitations](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [4-5 articles per day target](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Some articles already indexed, with "data mining" ranking slightly outside top 10](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Brand consistency issues noted in recent content pieces, workflow being developed](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Link Building Campaign

  - [First six link exchange candidates identified from client roster](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Cold outreach initiated for content collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Target of 5-10 links per month with varied domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Focus on AI-related anchor text for targeted keyword ranking improvement](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Outbound Campaign Progress

  - [Customer Success campaign showing high open rates](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Multiple campaigns being created across job titles and value propositions](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Plans to diversify targeting based on company sizes, funding status, and job changes](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Need for more specific industry and role targeting, especially in data center space](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Datagrid Use Cases and Product Understanding

  - [Success seen with companies in data center build space](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Need for GrowthX team to gain deeper understanding of Datagrid's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Thiago to provide more detailed use cases, including transcript analysis for customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Opportunity to leverage Thiago's expertise and track record for social content](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Plan to create short, unfiltered video content explaining use cases](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Use social engagement to generate warm leads for outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

### Content Pipeline and Use Case Documentation

  - [Tomorrow's call to focus on content generation pipeline and specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Need for more structured approach to documenting and sharing use cases with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Regroup internally at GrowthX to strategize more aggressive growth tactics](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Thiago to provide access to call recordings for GrowthX team to analyze](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
  - [Schedule dedicated time to deep-dive into specific use cases (e.g., call transcription)](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Vivek to share upcoming content topics and keywords with Datagrid team](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Marcel and Thiago to sync on social media strategy and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft LinkedIn posts based on call recordings and Thiago's insights](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Continue ramping up content production and link-building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/iipGbHMdyVR-EFdLpx88EMV8bgGzVxN2?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
